sources.name: UNESCO DataHub - Intangible Heritage List
sources.use: source-aware intangible heritage metadata, not unrestricted media redistribution

sources.name: Local Contexts
sources.use: protocol inspiration for Traditional Knowledge and Biocultural labels; do not copy or alter protected label icons

sources.name: CARE Principles for Indigenous Data Governance
sources.use: governance principles: Collective Benefit, Authority to Control, Responsibility and Ethics

principles.body_fr: Un contenu Baobab doit renforcer la communauté, l'apprentissage, la mémoire locale ou la transmission responsable.
principles.body_en: A Baobab record should benefit community, learning, local memory or responsible transmission.

principles.body_fr: Les détenteurs, locuteurs, familles ou communautés doivent pouvoir définir ce qui est public, privé, réservé ou à corriger.
principles.body_en: Knowledge holders, speakers, families or communities should define what is public, private, restricted or corrected.

principles.body_fr: Baobab privilégie la source, le contexte, le consentement, la relecture locale et la capacité à retirer un contenu.
principles.body_en: Baobab prioritizes source, context, consent, local review and the ability to withdraw material.

principles.body_fr: Aucun élément sensible, rituel, familial, sacré ou communautaire ne doit être transformé en contenu public par défaut.
principles.body_en: Sensitive, ritual, family, sacred or community material must not become public content by default.

sensitivity_levels.default_action_fr: Peut être affiché si source, licence et contexte sont présents.
sensitivity_levels.default_action_en: May be displayed when source, license and context are present.

sensitivity_levels.default_action_fr: Rester local sauf accord explicite des personnes ou familles concernées.
sensitivity_levels.default_action_en: Keep local unless concerned people or families explicitly agree.

sensitivity_levels.default_action_fr: Demander une relecture communautaire avant partage ou publication.
sensitivity_levels.default_action_en: Require community review before sharing or publishing.

sensitivity_levels.default_action_fr: Ne pas publier. Garder local, protégé, ou retirer si la communauté le demande.
sensitivity_levels.default_action_en: Do not publish. Keep local, protected, or remove if the community requests it.
